name: PRX vs PIERROT phase3 comparison prompts
note: 기존 baseprior 60 / infer.sh 배터리와 겹치지 않는 신규 프롬프트. 능력 축별 20개.

a white ceramic coffee mug on a desk with the exact visible text "DEEP WORK" printed in small black sans-serif letters
a cut geode crystal on a dark slate surface, purple interior crystals catching a single directional light, macro photography, sharp focus

a weathered orange rally car mid-drift on a gravel forest road, dust cloud behind, spectators blurred at the treeline
a children's storybook illustration of a hedgehog wearing a scarf reading under a mushroom, soft watercolor washes, warm autumn palette
